headline: Tractor Supply (TSCO) Lags Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Tractor Supply (TSCO) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -10.15% and -1.48%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: Tractor Supply (NASDAQ:TSCO) Misses Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations
summary: Rural goods retailer Tractor Supply (NASDAQ:TSCO) fell short of the market’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026 as sales rose 3.6% year on year to $3.59 billion. Its GAAP profit of $0.31 per share was 9% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: Tractor Supply (NASDAQ:TSCO) Misses Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations
content.summary: Rural goods retailer Tractor Supply (NASDAQ:TSCO) fell short of the market’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026 as sales rose 3.6% year on year to $3.59 billion. Its GAAP profit of $0.31 per share was 9% below analysts’ consensus estimates.
